purpose: Decide whether a bounded query-major group cache is the right GEMM-plus-epilogue style reducer for the sparse MLA/LI compressed-dKV wall.

operator_contract.math: For each selected (token, head, selected_slot), compute dKV contribution and reduce by compressed group before global dKV writes.
operator_contract.motivation: Apply the GEMM-plus-epilogue lesson by keeping MFMA contribution tiles query-major while moving grouped reduction into the producer epilogue, avoiding raw selected-row partial slabs and scalar atomic storms.

baseline_context.read: The prior runtime gate showed dense pair-slot local accumulation is the wall, not the final global emit. This planner asks whether a smaller sparse cache can keep the GEMM epilogue idea without becoming that dense table.

decision.reason: Useful reduction only appears when cache_slots is near the full 1024 compressed-group active set. Smaller 512-768 slot caches leave 5x-29x too many emitted rows versus perfect segmentation, while 896 slots is already close to dense-table cost and still leaves 2.6x-4.4x extra rows.
decision.implication_for_gemm_plus_epilogue: The epilogue must be sparse/segmented at warp or block level. A dense active_group x D epilogue table repeats the measured pair-slot accumulation wall and does not preserve the CODA-style benefit.
decision.tilelang_direction: Do not spend the next TileLang/HIP implementation on a bounded hash/cache reducer. Push a true sorted segmented reducer or group-owned final reduction fed by query-major MFMA contribution tiles.
next_kernel_contract: consume the cheap prepacked LI route
preserve query-major q/dO reuse for contribution MFMA
perform lane/warp/block segmented accumulation for repeated compressed groups before global memory
emit compact partial rows keyed by compressed group and D block
finish with the already-cheap compact segmented reducer or one reduced atomic per segment

commands: docker run --rm --network host --ipc host --device /dev/kfd --device /dev/dri --group-add video --cap-add SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace -w /workspace sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 python3 tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/plan_sparse_dkv_query_major_cache_reducer.py --seq-len 4096 --layer-id 2 --token-blocks 32,64 --selected-blocks 256,512 --cache-slots 16,32,64,128,256,512,1024 --summary-path run_artifacts/actual_li_query_major_cache_reducer_plan_s4096_layer2_20260604.json --json
